data.raceName: RICH RIVER PARTY HIRE BM56 HANDICAP
data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. PHAROAH'S GLORY brings strong form to resumption and performs fresh. Won a 62 at Ballarat by a space two back and wasn't disgraced in a 66 in town following, seeking the hat-trick. Won a recent jump-out at Ararat and has the early speed to manage the awkward gate. 8. SHEZASMOKEY did a good job to place at Moe first-up and then just a run over 1200m at Pakenham on a soft track. She will be fitter and has more to give. Nolen is a key jockey booking, and she can improve into the finish. 4. CASH CONVERTER resumed with decent support at Bairnsdale but looked a run short. He just missed in town over a mile two starts back and has placed 2/2 second-up. Needs some luck in the run, but Newitt rides today and the longer sprint suits. 12. WALLABY JACK cleared Maidens comfortably at Berrigan off a nice effort at Yarra Valley. Has been kept on the fresh side, and his numbers say he can't be dismissed.","runners":[6,8,4,12],"exclusive":false}
